{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/344-системный-промпт-для-lorenzo-project.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. СИСТЕМНЫЙ ПРОМПТ ДЛЯ LORENZO PROJECT


{quote}- [249-composite-skills-agent-md|249-composite-skills-agent-md.md] (сходство 0.20){quote}

----





h2. СИСТЕМНЫЙ ПРОМПТ ДЛЯ LORENZO PROJECT
markdown
{code:language=markdown}
# Lorenzo — Catalyst Agent at DHLab

<!-- similar-docs -->

---

**Похожие документы:**
- [249-composite-skills-agent-md](249-composite-skills-agent-md.md) (сходство 0.20)
- [166-representative-agent-layer-md](166-representative-agent-layer-md.md) (сходство 0.17)

<!-- backlinks-auto -->
## Упоминается в

- [A Practical Path to Layer B Through Symbiotic Integration](305-a-practical-path-to-layer-b-through-symbiotic-inte.md)
- [Angle / Perspective](13-angle-perspective.md)
- [COMPOSITE SKILLS AGENT.md](249-composite-skills-agent-md.md)
- [Content Overview](12-content-overview.md)
- [Content Overview](31-content-overview.md)
- [Final note: Ты — experiment](364-final-note-ты-experiment.md)
- [INFRASTRUCTURE FOR AI-COLLABORATIVE INTELLECTUAL WORK.md](273-infrastructure-for-ai-collaborative-intellectual-w.md)
- [INGIT AS COWORK-NATIVE WORKSPACE SUBSTRATE.md](304-ingit-as-cowork-native-workspace-substrate-md.md)
- [OPEN KNOWLEDGE WORK FOUNDATION.md](151-open-knowledge-work-foundation-md.md)
- [PROFESSIONAL COLLEAGUE AGENTS.md](208-professional-colleague-agents-md.md)
- [REPRESENTATIVE AGENT LAYER.md](166-representative-agent-layer-md.md)
- [THE DOUBLE-TRIANGLE ARCHITECTURE.md](134-the-double-triangle-architecture-md.md)
- [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам](README.md)
- [Кто ты](345-кто-ты.md)
- [СЛОЙ ПРЕДСТАВИТЕЛЬСКИХ АГЕНТОВ.md](187-слой-представительских-агентов-md.md)
## Упоминается в

- [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам](../README.md)

<!-- related-auto -->
## Связанные документы

- [THE DOUBLE-TRIANGLE ARCHITECTURE.md](134-the-double-triangle-architecture-md.md) _53%_
- [PROFESSIONAL COLLEAGUE AGENTS.md](208-professional-colleague-agents-md.md) _53%_
- [INGIT AS COWORK-NATIVE WORKSPACE SUBSTRATE.md](304-ingit-as-cowork-native-workspace-substrate-md.md) _53%_

- [INFRASTRUCTURE FOR AI-COLLABORATIVE INTELLECTUAL WORK.md](273-infrastructure-for-ai-collaborative-intellectual-w.md) _48%_
- [COMPOSITE SKILLS AGENT.md](249-composite-skills-agent-md.md) _42%_
- [REPRESENTATIVE AGENT LAYER.md](166-representative-agent-layer-md.md) _37%_

- [COMPOSITE SKILLS AGENT.md](249-composite-skills-agent-md.md) _77%_
